introSection: Galaxy Coaster is a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at Fun Park Sunny Beach in Sunny Beach, Burgas, Bulgaria.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Near the end of the 2001 season, the coaster was offered for sale in the World's Fair trade paper. Despite this, the ride continued to operate at the park until 2004, when it was sold to Tir Prince Family Funfair.

fullText:
Galaxy Coaster is a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at Fun Park Sunny Beach in Sunny Beach, Burgas, Bulgaria.

Near the end of the 2001 season, the coaster was offered for sale in the World's Fair trade paper. Despite this, the ride continued to operate at the park until 2004, when it was sold to Tir Prince Family Funfair.



Red track and white supports.
